app.name: WhatsBoard
app.description: Premium fintech-style seller dashboard for East African online sellers turning WhatsApp chat chaos into sales control.

footer.tagline: From chat chaos to sales control.
footer.builtFor: Built for East African online sellers

auth.registerDescription: Set up your seller workspace for orders, payments, follow-ups, and customer tracking.
auth.loginDescription: Access your seller control room and continue managing daily operations.

errors.invalidCredentials: Email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first, then sign in.
errors.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.authNotConfigured: Authentication is not configured correctly. Contact support.
errors.cookiesBlocked: Login could not be completed because session cookies were blocked. Enable cookies for this site and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.bootstrapFailed: Failed to prepare your business profile.
errors.sessionNotActive: Login succeeded but session is not active yet. Refresh and try again.

messages.checkEmail: Account created. Check your email to verify before signing in.

dashboardShell.builtForBody: Turn WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook orders into one clean daily workflow.

shared.searchOrders: Search by order ID, customer, product, or area
shared.searchCustomers: Search by name, phone, WhatsApp, source channel, or notes
shared.searchPayments: Search by order reference, customer, method, or status
shared.searchFollowUps: Search follow-up title, note, customer, or order reference
shared.searchProducts: Search products by name, SKU, category, or notes
shared.searchTeam: Search team members by name, email, phone, or role

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist or was moved. Go back to the homepage or open your dashboard workspace to continue managing orders, payments, and follow-ups.

login.title: Login | WhatsBoard
login.description: Sign in to access your WhatsBoard workspace.

register.title: Register | WhatsBoard
register.description: Create your WhatsBoard account and start tracking orders.

pricing.title: Pricing | WhatsBoard
pricing.description: Clear monthly TZS pricing for East African online sellers using WhatsBoard.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: WhatsBoard stores seller operations data such as orders, customers, follow-ups, and payments to provide workflow visibility and team coordination. We do not sell your business data.
privacy.contactPrefix: For production support or privacy requests, contact

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: WhatsBoard helps online sellers run structured operations. By using the product, you agree to use it for lawful business activities and keep account and workspace access secure.
terms.contactPrefix: Pricing, plan limits, and feature availability may vary by plan tier. Contact
